name: ravenclaude-core
description: Domain-neutral Team Lead + specialist-agents pattern for Claude Code: 14 specialists, 24 skills, a dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, hooks, rules, and templates. Includes the Capability Grounding Protocol (environment + decision-tree priors, alternate-methods enumeration, honest blocked-reporting), the Structured Output Protocol for handoffs, a Researcher meta-skill, a comfort-posture dashboard that writes Claude Code permission rules per layer on a 3-level deny/ask/allow scale, an opt-in command-review tribunal (the Thing) — a three-seat reviewer panel + tie-breaker that votes allow/edit/deny across all comfort-posture categories, and a WebFetch return-envelope sanitizer (webfetch-hardening skill + sanitize-webfetch-body.py) that strips injection-shaped blocks from fetched bodies before any agent treats them as content. The Look back tab carries a knowledge-health card (Idunn). Slash commands: /init-agent-ready, /wrap, /set-posture, /dashboard.
